sections.paragraph:
verbal adj. one who is wearied, tired, exhausted. Deu 25:18 2Sa 17:2 Ecc 1:8, כָּל־הַדְּבָרִים יְגֵעִים “all words are wearied,” are become weary (not as Winer renders it, tire, make weary), [“i.e. he is wearied who would declare all these things in words”].

[יְגִעָה (the form actually occurring) see יְגִיעָה .]
